title: Call of the Sound Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A sound no one can ignore calls the Dragon Masters to Remus! 🔔

q.en: What special ability does Eko have as a Dragon Mage?
q.zh: 作为“龙法师”，艾柯拥有什么特殊能力？

options.en: She can fly without a dragon
options.zh: 她能在没有龙的情况下飞行

options.en: She can use Neru's energy to make force fields and blasts
options.zh: 她能借用内鲁的能量制造力场和能量冲击

options.en: She can read other people's minds

explain.en: Because her bond with Neru is so strong, Eko can tap into the Thunder Dragon's energy and shape it herself.
explain.zh: 因为她和内鲁的羁绊极强，艾柯能借用雷龙的能量并自行塑造成力场等形态。

q.en: What causes the strange red-and-yellow mist over the arena in Remus?
q.zh: 雷默斯竞技场上空那团红黄相间的怪雾是由什么引起的？

options.zh: 一场即将来临的暴风雨

explain.en: The mist is the sign of a wizard battle — Marco challenged Felix, and their runaway magic built up into the cloud.
explain.zh: 那团雾是巫师对决的标志——马尔科向菲利克斯发起挑战，两人失控的魔法聚成了云。

options.en: A blind Dragon Master whose dragon is Sono
options.zh: 一位失明、龙是索诺的驯龙师

options.en: A guard at the castle gate

explain.en: Tessa is blind and relies on her Sound Dragon Sono to guide and describe the world to her.
explain.zh: 泰莎双目失明，依靠她的音龙索诺为她引路、描述周围的世界。

q.en: What does Sono the Sound Dragon look like?

options.en: A small red dragon with one head
A green dragon with tiny wings
A blue dragon with large wings
A dragon with rainbow wavy scales, four legs, and no wings
options.zh: 一条有彩虹波纹鳞片、四条腿、没有翅膀的龙

explain.en: Sono has a wavy pattern of rainbow colors across her scales, four legs, and no wings.
explain.zh: 索诺的鳞片上有彩虹色的波纹，有四条腿，没有翅膀。

q.en: How does Griffith end up turned into a duck?
q.zh: 格里菲斯是怎么变成一只鸭子的？

options.en: Marco hits him with a sizzling red-energy blast
options.zh: 马尔科用一道滋滋作响的红能量击中了他

options.en: Tessa cast a spell on him

explain.en: When Griffith tells the dueling wizards to stop, Marco blasts him with red magic that turns the wizard into a white duck.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯劝两位决斗的巫师停手时，马尔科用红魔法击中他，把他变成了一只白鸭。

q.en: What object can soak up the out-of-control wizard magic?
q.zh: 什么东西能吸收那股失控的巫师魔法？

explain.en: The Head Wizard Jayana says only a Power Crystal can absorb the swirling cloud of uncontrolled magic.
explain.zh: 巫师首领贾亚娜说，只有能量水晶才能吸收那团失控的魔法云。

q.en: Why can't a wizard simply grab the Power Crystal?
q.zh: 为什么巫师不能自己去拿能量水晶？

options.en: It is too hot to touch
Touching it would make them lose all their magic forever
options.zh: 碰到它就会永远失去自己全部的法力

explain.en: The crystal absorbs the magic of whoever touches it, so a wizard who grabs it loses their powers forever — which is why the Dragon Masters must use it.
explain.zh: 水晶会吸收触碰者的魔法，所以巫师一碰就会永远失去法力，因此必须由驯龙师来使用。

q.en: How do Tessa and Sono get the crystal out of the unbreakable rock?
q.zh: 泰莎和索诺是如何从那块“不可破坏的岩石”里取出水晶的？

options.en: They smash the rock with Worm's powers
options.zh: 他们用沃姆的力量砸碎岩石

options.en: Jayana opens the rock with a spell
options.zh: 贾亚娜用咒语打开岩石

options.en: They pass through it as sound waves
options.zh: 她们化作声波穿过了岩石

explain.en: Sono can turn into sound waves, so Tessa and her dragon melt right through the rock and carry the crystal back out.
explain.zh: 索诺能变成声波，于是泰莎和她的龙直接“融化”穿过岩石，把水晶带了回来。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters finally stop Marco and Felix from fighting?
q.zh: 驯龙师们最终是如何让马尔科和菲利克斯停止打斗的？

options.zh: 格里菲斯大声训斥他们

options.en: Zera sings a lullaby and Sono makes it loud to put them to sleep
options.zh: 泽拉唱摇篮曲，索诺把声音放大，让他们睡着

explain.en: Petra's hydra Zera sings a soft song while Sono aims and amplifies the sound waves, lulling both wizards to sleep.
explain.zh: 佩特拉的四头蛇龙泽拉唱起轻柔的歌，索诺把声波对准并放大，哄得两位巫师沉沉睡去。

q.en: What decision does Petra make at the end of the book?
q.zh: 在书的结尾，佩特拉做出了什么决定？

options.en: She returns to Bracken with Drake
options.zh: 她随德雷克回到布拉克恩

options.en: She stays in Remus to learn from Tessa
options.zh: 她留在雷默斯向泰莎学习

explain.en: Petra misses her home region and wants to explore what Zera and Sono can do together, so she stays in Remus.
explain.zh: 佩特拉想念家乡一带，也想探索泽拉和索诺联手能做什么，于是她留在了雷默斯。
